title: malus pseudocavilla
intro: Malus pseudocavilla, also known as the 'Chinese Crab Apple', is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus pseudocavilla include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Malus pseudocavilla can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
